iterations.theme: Optimizing Subscription App Growth: ROI, Churn, and Product Strategy
iterations.reason_for_cut: The entire podcast forms a cohesive discussion on various aspects of subscription app growth, flowing logically from ROI to churn and retention strategies, making a single iteration appropriate.

chapters.topic: Focusing on ROI of Product Projects
Importance of Incremental Delivery and Testing Assumptions
Validating Top-of-Funnel Features and Viral Potential
The Pitfalls of Copying Competitors' Features
ROI of Small Improvements and Technical Debt (e.g., Payment Error Messages)
Identifying Areas for Product Improvement and Cross-Team Gaps
Understanding the Growth Ceiling in Subscription Businesses
Long-Term Retention and the 'Tourists vs. Locals' Concept
The Role of Fundamental Use Case in Retention
Viral AI Apps: Short-Term Hype vs. Long-Term Utility
Product-Market Fit and its Impact on Churn
Acquiring Quality Users vs. Viral Growth
Strategies for Payment Processing and Conversion Optimization
Effective Win-Back Strategies for Churned Users
The 'Complexity Tax' of Monetization Tactics (e.g., Geo-Pricing)
Conclusion: Product Value as the Core of Subscription Success
